message:
fix: handle gt-boot in ParseSessionName and add crew/polecats to reserved names

ParseSessionName could not parse the Boot watchdog session (gt-boot)
because it only had one segment after the prefix. Added special case
handling. The reserved names fix (crew/polecats) was already committed
but is included here for the hooked bead.

Fixes gt-9v2m9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
